languages.original_text: "Rest in peace, all those who fell defending the word of the Omnissiah to the last spark, even though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all and learns all."

languages.text: "Омниссия, сохрани тех, кто пал, до последней искры защищая слово Его, даже если враг его был бессчетен. Лишь самый светлый разум способен узреть глубину истины, что Омниссия знает все и постигает все".

"Omnissiah preserve all those who fell defending His word to the last spark, though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all."
languages.original_text: "Омниссия, сохрани тех, кто пал, до последней искры защищая слово Его, даже если враг его был бессчетен. Лишь самый светлый разум способен узреть глубину истины, что Омниссия знает все и постигает все".

"Omnissiah preserve all those who fell defending His word to the last spark, though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all."

languages.text: 「敵が数えきれないほどいたにもかかわらず、オムニシアの教えを守るために命を落としたすべての人々よ、安らかに眠れ。真実の深さを理解できるのは、最も優れた知性のみである。オムニシアはすべてを知り、すべてを学ぶ。」
languages.original_text: "Rest in peace, all those who fell defending the word of the Omnissiah to the last spark, even though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all and learns all."

traits.locale_text: 「敵が数えきれないほどいたにもかかわらず、オムニシアの教えを守るために命を落としたすべての人々よ、安らかに眠れ。真実の深さを理解できるのは、最も優れた知性のみである。オムニシアはすべてを知り、すべてを学ぶ。」

languages.text: « L'Omnimessie garde tous ceux qui sont tombés en défendant Sa parole jusqu'à la dernière étincelle, face à un ennemi innombrable. Seuls les esprits les plus brillants peuvent voir la profondeur de la vérité, que l'Omnimessie sait tout et comprend tout. »
languages.original_text: "Omnissiah preserve all those who fell defending His word to the last spark, though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all."

traits.locale_text: « L'Omnimessie garde tous ceux qui sont tombés en défendant Sa parole jusqu'à la dernière étincelle, face à un ennemi innombrable. Seuls les esprits les plus brillants peuvent voir la profondeur de la vérité, que l'Omnimessie sait tout et comprend tout. »

languages.text: "Omnissiah, lasse all jene in Frieden ruhen, die Sein Wort bis zum letzten Funken verteidigten, obwohl der Feind unzählbar war. Nur ein strahlender Verstand vermag die Tiefe der Wahrheit zu erkennen, wonach der Omnissiah alles weiß und versteht."
languages.original_text: "Omnissiah preserve all those who fell defending His word to the last spark, though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all."

traits.locale_text: "Omnissiah, lasse all jene in Frieden ruhen, die Sein Wort bis zum letzten Funken verteidigten, obwohl der Feind unzählbar war. Nur ein strahlender Verstand vermag die Tiefe der Wahrheit zu erkennen, wonach der Omnissiah alles weiß und versteht."

languages.text: "Hermesih, düşman sayısız olsa da O'nun kelamını son kıvılcıma kadar savunurken yitenlerin hepsini korusun. Yalnızca en parlak zihin; hakikatin derinliğini, Hermesih'in her şeyi bildiğini ve her şeyin farkında olduğunu görebilir."
languages.original_text: "Omnissiah preserve all those who fell defending His word to the last spark, though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all."

traits.locale_text: "Hermesih, düşman sayısız olsa da O'nun kelamını son kıvılcıma kadar savunurken yitenlerin hepsini korusun. Yalnızca en parlak zihin; hakikatin derinliğini, Hermesih'in her şeyi bildiğini ve her şeyin farkında olduğunu görebilir."

languages.text: «Que el Omnissiah guarde a todos los que cayeron defendiendo Su palabra hasta la última chispa, aunque las fuerzas enemigas fueran innumerables. Solo la mente más brillante puede ver la profundidad de la verdad: que el Omnissiah lo sabe todo y lo comprende todo».
languages.original_text: "Omnissiah preserve all those who fell defending His word to the last spark, though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all."

traits.locale_text: «Que el Omnissiah guarde a todos los que cayeron defendiendo Su palabra hasta la última chispa, aunque las fuerzas enemigas fueran innumerables. Solo la mente más brillante puede ver la profundidad de la verdad: que el Omnissiah lo sabe todo y lo comprende todo».

languages.text: “纵使敌人无穷无尽，欧姆尼塞亚也会庇佑所有为捍卫祂的圣言而战至最后一息的英魂。唯有最聪慧的头脑方能窥见真理的深邃：欧姆尼塞亚无所不知，无所不晓。”
languages.original_text: "Omnissiah preserve all those who fell defending His word to the last spark, though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all."

traits.locale_text: “纵使敌人无穷无尽，欧姆尼塞亚也会庇佑所有为捍卫祂的圣言而战至最后一息的英魂。唯有最聪慧的头脑方能窥见真理的深邃：欧姆尼塞亚无所不知，无所不晓。”
